assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_To_Account_Collection
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add To Account Collection

formulas.name: descriptionNoContact
formulas.expression: "There is no contacts available for " & {!AccountSelected.Name} & ". Please update the system with a contact"

formulas.name: lineOfBusiness
formulas.expression: IF( OR({!$User.FirstName} = "Denise",{!$User.FirstName} = "Victoria"), "Cyber Security", "Unified Communications and Collaboration")

recordCreates.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_2_of_Create_Activity
recordCreates.label: Copy 1 of Copy 2 of Create Activity

fields.name: PastCloudComments
fields.fieldText: Past Cloud Comments:

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: OI!!!! You need to select a contact to update
